heading: Have you already applied for help with your counterclaim fee?
question: Have you already applied for help with your counterclaim fee?
revealedHwfQuestionLabel: Enter your Help with Fees reference number
revealedHwfQuestionHint: You will have received this number when you applied for Help with Fees. This reference must not have been used for a previous application.For example, HWF-A1B-23C
